name: SkillWeaver
description: Compositional skill routing: decompose queries, retrieve relevant skills, inject into context via context.collect hook.

provider.description: LLM provider for the decomposition model.

apiKey.description: API key override. If null, uses agent's provider credentials.

backend.description: Embedding backend: local (Xenova/transformers), cloud (OpenAI), custom (OpenAI-compatible endpoint).

model.description: Model name for the local backend.

cloudModel.description: Model name for the cloud (OpenAI) backend.

customModel.description: Model name sent to the custom backend endpoint.

cloudDimensions.description: Vector dimensions for the cloud (OpenAI) backend. If null, defaults to 1536.

customDimensions.description: Vector dimensions for the custom backend. If null, defaults to 384.

endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL for the custom backend.

apiKey.description: API key for the custom backend.

topK.description: Number of skills returned per sub-task.

hintSize.description: Total hints passed to SAD Pass-2.

minQueryLength.description: Skip routing for queries shorter than this.

retrievalTimeoutMs.description: Maximum milliseconds the retrieval step may run before being aborted.

dirs.description: Custom directories to scan for SKILL.md files. If empty, defaults to ~/.openclaw/skills.

enabled.label: Enable SkillWeaver
enabled.help: Master on/off switch for automatic skill routing.

decomposer.provider.label: Decomposer Provider
decomposer.provider.help: LLM provider for the decomposition model.

decomposer.model.label: Decomposer Model
decomposer.model.help: Model used for query decomposition (smaller/cheaper recommended).

embedding.backend.label: Embedding Backend
embedding.backend.help: Where to compute embeddings: locally, via OpenAI cloud, or custom endpoint.

sad.enabled.label: SAD (2-Pass)
sad.enabled.help: Enable Skill-Aware Decomposition for improved accuracy.

skills.dirs.label: Skill Directories
skills.dirs.help: Custom directories to scan for SKILL.md files. Leave empty for default (~/.openclaw/skills).
